---
title: "Facebook (WiSe 24/25)"
type: "descriptive"
semester: "WS 24/25"
categories: ["Facebook"]
image: "image.png"
description: "Analyse von Netzwerkdaten aus Facebook und wie Personen diese Netzwerke im Job nutzen."
listing:
  - id: top3
    contents: ["student_projects/*/*.qmd"]
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    sort: rank
    max-items: 3
  - id: rest
    contents: ["student_projects/*/*.qmd"]
    type: table
    sort: rank
    fields: [rank, title, authors_links]
    field-display-names:
      rank: "Rang"
      title: "Ausarbeitung"
      authors_links: "Autor:innen"
    exclude:
      filename: ["dumbstruck_elegant_spreadwing.qmd", "established_enervated_louse.qmd", "unchanged_airsick_loggerheadturtle.qmd"]
---
## Top 3 Ausarbeitungen

::: {#top3}
:::

## Weitere Ausarbeitungen

::: {#rest}
:::
